summary: Comprehensive testing of BETRADARMUS platform - Telegram FREE group links, auth flows, admin dashboard, statistics, FAQ, and pricing. All backend API tests pass (22/22). All frontend E2E tests pass (30/30).

issues.description: Pricing mismatch between API and UI - API returns 19€/39€ for PRO/ELITE but UI shows 49€/199€. This may be intentional but should be verified.
Signal Generator returns 503 when Telegram bot is not configured - this is expected behavior but should be documented.

seed_data_creation: Created admin user (admin@betradarmus.de) with elite subscription for testing admin dashboard functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests passing. Telegram FREE group link (https://t.me/+Pb8X_nXzKu41N2Yy) verified in Footer, Landing How It Works section, FAQ page, and Auth modal. Admin dashboard tabs (Users, Payments, Emails, Signals, KI Generator) all functional. Signal generator endpoints return 503 when Telegram bot not configured - this is expected.
